column1: 2004-08-13вЂЋ"yea these are kinda old but what the hell       One Last Poem   i wrote out my heart my feelings the things i thought and did i wrote to tell u things i wrote out all the things i wanted to say i wrote them out to express the feelings i had for u now im writing out the feelings im not supposed to have for u ""She doesn't deserve someone as great as u...ull be better off with someone else"" something said to try and comfort me when all i was thinking was she deserves someone better than me...and i don't want anybody else my first love now gone but not the love i have for them the love im supposed to lose the love i can't have... but why can't i have it no reason was given other than thats the way the world works and i have to...forget love shes a motherfucker eh... love that was my mistake i could be attracted to her just not love her love that was my mistake how many times has love ever been a mistake when everythingГўв‚¬в„ўs meant to be broken ironic I said you could have this heart to break so you took advantage of that Гўв‚¬Е“you set your self up for heartbreakГўв‚¬ maybe I did but I didnГўв‚¬в„ўt expect it to hurt like this a hurt that ive felt before but never this bad its not as bad when they never liked you in the first place a hurt that you canГўв‚¬в„ўt describe a deep hurt hurtГўв‚¬В¦ so I'm writing these things out in one last poem to you one last poem written for you about you with you in my mind before I begin my road toГўв‚¬В¦ forgettingГўв‚¬В¦Гўв‚¬В¦       Walking     Ive walked a long lonely road Walked it many times Then I met you and the road wasnГўв‚¬в„ўt so lonely I could walk with you Tell you they way I feel Talk about things I wouldnГўв‚¬в„ўt tell anyone else But then you changed roads So suddenly you changed And then I stood for a while But all I could do is keep walking Down this lonely road"
